title: Generate Clean Digital Illustration Full
sourceTitle: Chatgpt Prompt Generate Clean Digital Illustration Full

imagePrompts.prompt: Generate a clean, digital illustration of a full-art Pokémon TCG card design, viewed as a flat, scan-like digital asset (not a photo of a physical object). Transform the person in the uploaded photo into an anime-style Pokémon Trainer, maintaining their likeness. Pair them in a dynamic action pose alongside a Pikachu. The background should be intense elemental energy matching the Pokémon’s type… (cont)
